creator: bradley@dunn.org
text:
ports/mail/imap-uw builds fine, but it does not work after being
installed. You get this:
ld.so failed: Undefined symbol "_bezerkproto" in ipop3d:/usr/local/lib/libc-client.so.2.1
The reason is that the bezerk mailbox driver has been replaced by
the unix mailbox driver. The patches need to be updated.

Fix: 

Fix the patches.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/imap-uw
make install
add entires to /etc/inetd.conf
telnet localhost imap
